agents.name: agent_d
agents.description: Audits Revit element categories for missing parameter values and uses Claude to predict and fill missing data. Use this agent for any prompt about checking, auditing, filling, or populating parameters on elements of a given category (e.g. fill Description for all Walls, audit Fire Rating on Doors, populate Mark on Windows).

actions.name: audit_data
actions.description: Check elements of a category for missing parameter values; return statistics only (no writes).

actions.name: fill_data
actions.description: Predict and write missing parameter values via Claude across all elements of the given category. Modifies the Revit model.

actions.name: start_pipeline
actions.description: Run audit + fill + AI sanity check end-to-end and return combined results.

input_schema.category_name: string or array of strings — Revit Category name(s) to operate on (e.g. "Walls", or ["Walls", "Doors"]). Case-insensitive.
input_schema.parameter_name: string — exact parameter name to audit/fill

agents.name: agent_i
agents.description: Revit-to-Notion BIM assistant. Collects elements from the active Revit document and uploads them to the Railway-hosted Notion bridge. Use this agent for any prompt about exporting/pushing/uploading the current Revit model to Notion or to the cloud BIM dashboard.

actions.name: push_to_notion
actions.description: Collect all elements from the active Revit document and upload them to the Railway service. After upload, the user can open the Railway /chat UI to push the snapshot into Notion.

input_schema.mode: string (optional) — kept for compatibility; ignored by the local bridge.
